### last time

*  multiple issue
   *  fetch/read registers/do math/... for multiple instructions at once
*  out-of-order
   *  run instruction as values ready
   *  waiting for value from data cache? run next thing

###


## functional units {visibility="hidden"}

### an OOO pipeline (execution units) {.nostretch}

![](/ooo/texfig/oooPipelineExecute.figure.svg){width=900px}

{{< include /ooo/_realCpuFU.qmd >}}

## instruction dispatch (two-cycle multiplier) {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooDispatchAlt.qmd >}}

## complex instructions and condition codes {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooMicrocodeSummary.qmd >}}

## reassociation and data flow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_reassocDataFlow.qmd >}}

## the data flow limit {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /intro/_perf-examples.qmd >}}

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowLimitNew.qmd >}}

## OOO limits {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooLimitations.qmd >}}

## real OOO sizes {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooSkylakeSizes.qmd >}}

{{< include /bpred/_talk-basic.qmd >}}

### side channels

{{< include /spectre/_talk-inner.qmd >}}

### backup slides

{< include /ooo/_talk-backup.qmd >}}

{< include /bpred/_talk-advanced.qmd >}}
